_comment: Immortal Graveyard dimension type — 17-layer sealed graveyard. Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L76): in the Vermilion Bird Starfield. Sealed (needs specific access). No natural sky — the 17 layers stack vertically. No weather. Slightly warmer than normal due to Fire Essence residual energy (Wang Lin's Fire Essence potential awakened here). Nether-like effects for the dark, foreboding atmosphere. Prime Directive: the 17 layers are an objective structure built by immortals; the Fire Essence is a property of this place.
